backend/main.mo: Defines core data types for appointments, clients, financial statistics, reports, and repetition logic used across the backend.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries linking dashboard credit-calculation updates to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of all major frontend files, describing their functionality and recent updates.
frontend/index.html: Provides the base HTML template that loads the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app setup with routing, authentication handling, profile setup flow, and theme provider configuration.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog allowing users to choose between editing or deleting an appointment, including single or future-client‑wide actions.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Confirmation dialog for deleting appointments, supporting single or future-appointment deletion with backend mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: Dialog component for creating or editing appointments, managing form state, repetition settings, and client selection, and submitting via add/update hooks.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentEditM: Empty file with no implementation provided.
Displays a sorted list of appointments with repetition labels, payment status, and actions via an appointment action dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: Handles client photo upload, validation, cropping to 35×45mm, preview rendering, and removal.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: Shows three financial summary cards for total paid, total due, and monthly completed appointments.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying copyright and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar showing navigation buttons, user actions, and a trigger to open the new appointment dialog.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a detailed monthly financial listing table using precalculated totals and formatting helpers.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Displays a modal prompting the user to enter their name and saves the profile using a mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor instance tied to the user's identity and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state and persisted identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, client records, appointments, and related backend data.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets global Tailwind styles, theme variables, and custom layout rules for the Compta Mois table.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and mounts the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AgendaPage.tsx: Placeholder page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: Implements a full client management UI with create, edit, delete, sorting, CSV export, and form handling.
frontend/src/pages/ComptaMoisPage.tsx: Displays and manages monthly appointment accounting, including status updates, payments, and monthly financial stats.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page fetching monthly listings, appointments, and computing financial metrics with navigation between months.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity with marketing sections and a login button.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Generates PDF reports using monthly listings and appointments, computing revenues and totals based on selected period.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint arithmetic, clamping, and aggregation.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utilities to convert data to CSV format and trigger file downloads.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Image cropping utility to produce 35x45 passport-style photos and convert stored photos to display URLs.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Shared monthly listing calculations for revenues, credits, and client-specific financial formulas.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Time range utilities producing bigint timestamps and checking month ranges or future times.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters (including hash routing) and persisting them in sessionStorage, plus utilities to clear stored or hash parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s state, known dashboard calculation bug, and feature requirements to align monthly due computations across components.
